content: The overlapping uncurated search space of both 2024-2025 cutting-edge active learning agent memory SOTA development trajectories can itself be framed as an active learning problem, where the most valuable unlabeled 'data points' to sample next are the depth-unknown agent subdomains that both search processes independently marked as high-priority for further investigation. This creates a self-reinforcing curiosity-driven discovery loop that prioritizes high-uncertainty, high-gain research directions rather than incremental improvements to existing known architectures.
source_topics: active learning memory agent SOTA deep 2025
